data.body: LIVE-CHECK ATTESTATION (dogfood #618, 2026-07-13): rebase_on_behalf_of_uploader proven LIVE against Gerrit 3.14.1 — the deployed bot rebased #618 on-behalf to Patch Set 3 (submitter 'Rebar Bot Nava'), preserving the original uploader + DCO Signed-off-by + rebar-ticket trailers, which then earned a fresh Verified+1 and merged. https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/618 . Single-change routing (POST /rebase) exercised live; rebase:chain (multi-member) is the same on_behalf REST mechanism, unit-tested (test_multi_member_chain_uses_rebase_chain + the on_behalf body assertion). A live multi-member rebase:chain E2E is a bounded deferred follow-up.
